mapper.select: select id, monogram, email, version from portfolio.site_profile where id = #{siteId} for update

choose.when: select locale, skip_text, primary_nav, mobile_nav, open_menu, close_menu, language_text, back_to_top, project_tags from portfolio.site_accessibility_copy_translation where site_id=#{siteId} order by locale

select t.navigation_item_id, t.locale, t.label from portfolio.site_navigation_item_translation t join portfolio.site_navigation_item n on n.id=t.navigation_item_id where n.site_id=#{siteId} order by n.sort_order, t.locale
select id, version from portfolio.hero_section where site_id=#{siteId}

select t.hero_id, t.locale, t.eyebrow, t.display_name, t.secondary_name, t.role_text, t.headline, t.introduction, t.availability, t.primary_cta, t.secondary_cta, t.visual_label, t.stage_label from portfolio.hero_section_translation t join portfolio.hero_section h on h.id=t.hero_id where h.site_id=#{siteId} order by t.locale
select m.hero_id, m.media_asset_id, m.object_position, m.credit, m.source_url from portfolio.hero_media m join portfolio.hero_section h on h.id=m.hero_id where h.site_id=#{siteId}

select locale, label, title, introduction, image_notice, open_slot_label, open_slot_title, open_slot_text, open_slot_meta from portfolio.work_section_translation where site_id=#{siteId} order by locale
select locale, label, title, introduction, email_label, work_cta, roadmap_cta, footer_note from portfolio.contact_section_translation where site_id=#{siteId} order by locale
select t.fact_id, t.locale, t.label, t.value_text from portfolio.profile_fact_translation t join portfolio.profile_fact f on f.id=t.fact_id where f.site_id=#{siteId} order by f.sort_order, t.locale

select t.profile_skill_id, t.locale, t.name, t.status_text from portfolio.profile_skill_translation t join portfolio.profile_skill s on s.id=t.profile_skill_id where s.site_id=#{siteId} order by s.sort_order, t.locale

select t.stage_id, t.locale, t.period, t.title, t.summary from portfolio.roadmap_stage_translation t join portfolio.roadmap_stage s on s.id=t.stage_id where s.site_id=#{siteId} order by s.sort_order, t.locale
select o.id, o.stage_id, o.sort_order from portfolio.roadmap_outcome o join portfolio.roadmap_stage s on s.id=o.stage_id where s.site_id=#{siteId} order by s.sort_order, o.sort_order, o.id

select t.outcome_id, t.locale, t.outcome_text from portfolio.roadmap_outcome_translation t join portfolio.roadmap_outcome o on o.id=t.outcome_id join portfolio.roadmap_stage s on s.id=o.stage_id where s.site_id=#{siteId} order by s.sort_order, o.sort_order, t.locale
delete from portfolio.site_navigation_item_translation where navigation_item_id in (select id from portfolio.site_navigation_item where site_id=#{siteId})
delete from portfolio.hero_section_translation where hero_id in (select id from portfolio.hero_section where site_id=#{siteId})
delete from portfolio.hero_media where hero_id in (select id from portfolio.hero_section where site_id=#{siteId})
delete from portfolio.profile_fact_translation where fact_id in (select id from portfolio.profile_fact where site_id=#{siteId})
delete from portfolio.profile_skill_translation where profile_skill_id in (select id from portfolio.profile_skill where site_id=#{siteId})
delete from portfolio.roadmap_stage_translation where stage_id in (select id from portfolio.roadmap_stage where site_id=#{siteId})
delete from portfolio.roadmap_outcome where stage_id in (select id from portfolio.roadmap_stage where site_id=#{siteId})
delete from portfolio.roadmap_outcome_translation where outcome_id in (select o.id from portfolio.roadmap_outcome o join portfolio.roadmap_stage s on s.id=o.stage_id where s.site_id=#{siteId})
insert into portfolio.site_profile_translation(site_id, locale, display_name, secondary_name) values (#{r.siteId},#{r.locale},#{r.displayName},#{r.secondaryName})
insert into portfolio.site_seo_translation(site_id, locale, title, description) values (#{r.siteId},#{r.locale},#{r.title},#{r.description})
